problems_encountered.error_message: /usr/bin/ld: ../dms/drv_devmng/CMakeFiles/devdrv_obj.dir/ascend910/devdrv_hccl.c.o: relocation R_X86_64_32S against `.rodata' can not be used when making a shared object; recompile with -fPIC
problems_encountered.resolution: 为src/ascend_hal/下18个CMakeLists.txt文件中定义的21个OBJECT库添加-fPIC编译选项
problems_encountered.root_cause: OBJECT库没有链接intf_pub接口库，未继承-fPIC编译选项。openEuler 24.03的gcc 12.3.1对非PIC代码链接到共享库的检查比Ubuntu 24.04的gcc 13.3.0更严格

problems_encountered.error_message: fatal error: stdarg.h: No such file or directory
problems_encountered.source: 参考src/sdk_driver/seclib/Makefile中已有的gcc builtin include路径设置
problems_encountered.root_cause: 内核模块编译时，-isystem指定的用户空间include路径被内核Makefile覆盖，导致找不到gcc内置头文件stdarg.h。openEuler 6.6.0内核headers与Ubuntu 6.8.0处理方式不同

problems_encountered.error_message: make[7]: Warning: File has modification time X.XX s in the future
problems_encountered.resolution: 警告不影响构建结果，忽略
problems_encountered.source: 容器与宿主机之间的文件系统时间同步延迟
problems_encountered.root_cause: Docker容器挂载WSL2主机目录时的时间同步问题
